logs: ⚠ S01-T01 — status is committed, nothing to run.
summary: Code-orchestrated port of /forge:run-task — resolve the task pipeline, drive each phase (plan→review→implement→review→validate→approve→commit) through a subagent on its ROLE_TIER model (review/validate/approve→opus, plan/implement→sonnet, commit→haiku), hold the revision loop + verdict routing + escalation in JS.

phases.title: Resolve
phases.detail: one agent reads the task manifest + config, returns the resolved pipeline phases and pre-task status

phases.title: Pipeline
phases.detail: per phase: one subagent runs the gate + phase workflow + emits its own event; JS owns the phase index, revision counters, verdict routing, and escalation decision

phases.title: Report
phases.detail: summarise the terminal outcome — committed / escalated / blocked
